question: What is so fragile that saying its name breaks it?
I have keys, but no locks and a space, but no room. You can enter, but never leave. What am I?
The person who builds it sells it. The person who buys it never uses it. The person who uses it never knows it. What is it?
I am seen in the water, but I never get wet. What am I?
What can run but never walks, has a mouth but never talks, has a head but never weeps, has a bed but never sleeps?
